ingredients_text: Chocolate cream (62%) [sugar, vegetable oil (palm and/or sunflower and/or cottonseed), whey powder (milk product), cocoa powder, whole milk powder, hazelnut pulp, milk chocolate (1.9%), emulsifier (soy lecithin), flavor (hazelnut, vanillin)], biscuit (38%) [wheat flour (contains gluten), vegetable oil (palm and/or sunflower and/or cottonseed), sugar, modified potato starch, modified rice starch, raising agent (ammonium bicarbonate, sodium acid pyrophosphate, sodium bicarbonate), glucose syrup, egg, salt, coloring (plain caramel), flavor (vanillin)].
